label: Kid to camera confession
format_goal: A student directly addresses the phone camera with a raw, intimate confession that turns into a product rescue moment.

conversation_pattern.hook: Open on emotional truth within the first 2 seconds.
conversation_pattern.body: Student describes the real problem in plain Hinglish.
conversation_pattern.turn: Student says what changed after using Professor Curious.
conversation_pattern.close: End on relief or conviction, not hard sell.

shot_plan.camera_note: front camera, face close, imperfect framing
same room, same night, tiny shift in phone angle
same handheld session, calmer face, slight exhale

creative_rules: The footage must feel like a real student's phone recording.
Dialogue should sound spoken, not copywritten.
The product name must be audible at least once in the body or close.
